mapper.sql: id, account, password, nick_name, phone, email, avatar_url, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by, deleted, last_login_time, last_login_ip, login_count
mapper.select: SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE account = #{account} AND deleted = 0
SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE id = #{id} AND deleted = 0
SELECT r.code FROM sys_role r INNER JOIN sys_user_role ur ON r.id = ur.role_id WHERE ur.user_id = #{userId} AND r.status = 1 AND r.deleted = 0

SELECT FROM sys_user WHERE deleted = 0
AND account LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.account}, '%')
AND nick_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.nickName}, '%')
AND phone LIKE CONCAT('%', #{query.phone}, '%')
AND status = #{query.status}
ORDER BY create_time DESC
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO sys_user (account, password, nick_name, phone, email, avatar_url, status, create_time, update_time, create_by, update_by) VALUES (#{account}, #{password}, #{nickName}, #{phone}, #{email}, #{avatarUrl}, #{status}, NOW(), NOW(), #{createBy}, #{updateBy})
mapper.update: UPDATE sys_user SET nick_name = #{nickName}, phone = #{phone}, email = #{email}, status = #{status}, update_time = NOW(), update_by = #{updateBy} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET deleted = 1 WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET status = #{status} WHERE id = #{id}
UPDATE sys_user SET password = #{password} WHERE id = #{id}
